news.paragraph: Starbucks recently received a bullish reaffirmation from Stifel, which may provide positive sentiment for the stock. However, rising coffee prices present a potential headwind for margins that options traders should monitor. There are no imminent earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the current headlines.
headlines: Stifel Reaffirms Bullish View on Starbucks Corporation (SBUX)
